Analysis of Streaming Transactions

Based on Data Collected by SportsTV Germany

Karthik Bharadwaj and Akshay Mambakkam Sridharan

December 08, 2025

1 Data Breakdown

This report presents a comprehensive analysis of streaming transaction data for SportsTV Germany, a platform specializing in the distribution of amateur sporting event recordings. The dataset spans 2021-01-06 through 2025-10-16, representing comprehensive platform activity stored in a dimensional data warehouse with partitioned fact tables.

Key Performance Metrics:

  • Total Streaming Transactions: 996,091
  • Total Hours Streamed: 1,351,663 hours
  • Average Session Duration: 81.4 minutes
  • Completion Rate: 2.8%
  • Geographic Coverage: 6 countries
  • Sport Categories: 3 sports
  • Device Types: 6 devices
  • Quality Levels: 4 quality levels
  • Unique Users: 82,661

2 Growth of streaming transactions by streaming time and number of streaming events by sport

This analysis covers a 5-year period of streaming activity, with data collected from 2021 through 2025.

2.1 Growth in Streaming Events by Sport

2.2 Growth in Streaming Time by Sport

2.3 Year-over-Year Growth Summary

Streaming Transactions by Sport and Year
Year Ice Hockey Inline Hockey Ski Jumping Total
1 2,021 3,892 2,905 3,801 10,598
4 2,022 19,031 12,809 21,088 52,928
7 2,023 46,650 31,835 57,461 135,946
10 2,024 109,087 71,949 129,819 310,855
13 2,025 167,445 107,259 211,060 485,764

Key Findings: The data reveals that Ski Jumping is the most popular sport on the platform, accounting for 423,229 transactions. Streaming activity peaked in 2025 with 485,764 transactions recorded.

3 Number of streaming events per week for the most recent year

3.1 Weekly Transaction Volume

In 2025, the platform recorded 485,764 streaming events totaling 660,614 hours across 42 weeks. Weekly transactions averaged 11,566, peaking at 17,240 in week 40 and dropping to 6,509 in week 1.

3.2 Weekly Statistics Summary

Weekly Streaming Statistics for 2025
Metric Value
Average Weekly Transactions 11,566
Peak Week 40
Peak Week Transactions 17,240
Lowest Week 1
Lowest Week Transactions 6,509
Week-to-Week Variance 20.4%

5 Day of the week during which the most amount of content is streamed

This section analyzes which days of the week generate the most streaming activity, aggregated over the past three years by sport and country.

Analysis period: 2023 to 2025 (3 years)

5.1 Overall Day of Week Patterns

Peak Streaming Day: Wed with 182,126 total hours streamed over the past three years.
